prompt: Create a realistic outdoor lifestyle portrait photo of a young woman on a sunny city bridge in summer. She has long wavy warm chestnut brown hair blown outward by a gentle breeze, with strong side backlighting from the upper left creating a glowing golden rim light through individual hair strands. The subject is shown from the waist up, leaning slightly forward on a green metal railing, body angled in profile while turning her head subtly toward the camera. She wears a delicate sleeveless white dress with soft lace or textured fabric and thin straps. The background is an urban riverside or canal walkway with trees, buildings, railings, and pedestrians rendered as creamy bokeh; keep the scene natural, bright, and airy. Use a vertical 4:5 composition, shallow depth of field, warm late-afternoon sunlight, realistic skin tones, soft highlights, natural lens flare, and a high-end fashion/lifestyle photography look. Emphasize the luminous hair, wind movement, relaxed summer mood, and candid portrait feeling; no text, no watermark, no exaggerated posing.
